description: Recommended recoverable secret layout for Laia. Keep this in a private git-backed password store.

entries.notes: GitHub PAT used by update_laia_dashboard.py to clone/push dashboard.json.
OAuth client secret used to refresh Gmail readonly access tokens.
Readonly Gmail OAuth token/refresh token bundle.
Cloudflare Worker secret. Can be the same credential as laia/github/publish-pat if desired.
